violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Handwash sink was blocked. Needs to be kept free of items and useable at all times.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Measuring cup/scoops handles were in product in sugar and flour containers.
General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Do not use storage containers for scoops. All scoops need to have handles.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving and racks in kitchen area.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. -Several items in handwash sink upon arrival. Keep clean and accessible at all times.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Sink needs remounted-hanging off on wall. -Repair light switch.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Ceiling tiles in kitchen are acoustic style and are not cleanable. -Bare wood wall in kitchen behind front wall needs painted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling need more thorough cleaning in kitchen.
